card1.title: Introduction
card1.description: Watch the intro video to learn<newLineElement>the rules of the game<newLineElement>and its central challenge:<newLineElement>to explore powerful future digital solutions<newLineElement>in a fun, imaginative way.

card2.title: Exploration
card2.description: The Kering Digital Odyssey<newLineElement>is a digital board game with a map presen-<newLineElement>ting the different regions to explore, each of<newLineElement>which embodies a great value of the group<newLineElement>and aspect of our Digital future.

card3.title: Final
card3.description: Finish the game by completing all expe-<newLineElement>riences and capture the Golden Owl<newLineElement>in the last region.<newLineElement><newLineElement>The first finisher will be heralded the Kering<newLineElement>Employee of the Future.

card4.title: Experiences
card4.description: On each region, you are invited<newLineElement>to participate in experiences.<newLineElement>After each completed experience,<newLineElement>you win a concept card and some owls<newLineElement>when you complete a bonus.
